agreement.full_name: New Zealand Generalised System of Preferences - Pakistan (LDC treatment)

notes: CONFIRMED: Pakistan explicitly treated as LDC beneficiary per row 8's common note ('Pakistan is confirmed... as a Less Developed Country (LDC)... use the LDC preferential tariff treatment'). This means tariff_rates.condition should default to 'ldc' for this module's rows rather than the schema's general 'standard' default - FLAGGED as a per-module override the loader/handler needs to apply, not something the generic config field expresses on its own (no 'default_rate_condition' field exists yet in the config schema - may need to be added in a schema revision, or handled as a fixed rule inside the text_rate handler specifically for this module code).
